title: potentilla glandulosa subsp. ashlandica
intro: Potentilla glandulosa subsp. ashlandica, commonly known as Ashland cinquefoil, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the rose family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds that have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Ashland cinquefoil include its potential to reduce inflammation, alleviate digestive issues, and support the immune system. Ashland cinquefoil can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote overall well-being and combat infections.
